rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in valid AADL scopes: component type annexes for assumptions/guarantees, implementation annexes for bindings
Component type contracts should reference ports through valid variables or outputs, not subcomponent ports directly
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structural integrity when inserting AGREE annexes
Use authoritative AADL model data for port and type declarations
Align AGREE types with AADL data types to avoid assumed/actual mismatches
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Assumptions and guarantees must be scoped to component types; bindings to implementations
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as AGREE variables
Boolean data range comparisons with opaque types
Type mismatch diagnostics for assumed vs actual types
